testcase.name: Home page E2E + testid (SC01-MP-T08-E2E) > currentPage path is pages/home/index 且 view 数 ≥ 15 (sections 全 mount)
Home page E2E + testid (SC01-MP-T08-E2E) > home page renders key DOM nodes with testids
Home page E2E + testid (SC01-MP-T08-E2E) > page data contains expected MVP values after load
Home page E2E + testid (SC01-MP-T08-E2E) > mp.screenshot 截图落 artifact
buildGreeting (pure · time-dependent) > returns a string containing day of week + month + date
buildGreeting (pure · time-dependent) > contains a separator dot · between parts
buildGreeting (pure · time-dependent) > ends with a period-of-day greeting
buildGreeting (pure · time-dependent) > contains day name from 周一..周日
computeCirclePct (pure) > returns 0 when total is 0
computeCirclePct (pure) > returns 100 when done equals total
computeCirclePct (pure) > returns 50 for half done
computeCirclePct (pure) > rounds to nearest integer
computeCirclePct (pure) > returns 0 when done is 0
computeCirclePct (pure) > handles large numbers
derivePageState (pure) > returns LOADING when data is null and no error
derivePageState (pure) > returns ERROR when data is null and hasError
derivePageState (pure) > returns EMPTY when total is 0
derivePageState (pure) > returns READY when total > 0
derivePageState (pure) > returns READY even if hasError but data exists
derivePageState (pure) > EMPTY takes precedence over error when data.total = 0
buildCurrentWeekStrip (B4 + B5 · pure) > returns 7 days, 周一→周日 order
buildCurrentWeekStrip (B4 + B5 · pure) > B4 regression · 周一-周日 d values are 7 distinct consecutive numbers (no 22-duplicate)
buildCurrentWeekStrip (B4 + B5 · pure) > B5 regression · today is 周六 → days[5].today === true · others false
buildCurrentWeekStrip (B4 + B5 · pure) > B5 regression · 周日 (Sunday) 算本周最后一天 · today index = 6
buildCurrentWeekStrip (B4 + B5 · pure) > B5 regression · 周一 → today index = 0
buildCurrentWeekStrip (B4 + B5 · pure) > B5 regression · label reflects current week range (not hardcoded "4 月 20–26 日")
buildCurrentWeekStrip (B4 + B5 · pure) > label uses 2-digit day padding only when > 9 · single digit days unpadded inside label
buildCurrentWeekStrip (B4 + B5 · pure) > 每个 day 必带 dots[] (mockup 占位) · today 必带 num=8
SUBJECT_COLORS (B6 · 亮色 regression) > 数学 is mockup bright red #FF6B6B (not legacy dark #C41E3A)
SUBJECT_COLORS (B6 · 亮色 regression) > 物理 is mockup bright yellow #FFD166 (not legacy dark #0057B7)
SUBJECT_COLORS (B6 · 亮色 regression) > 英语 is mockup bright green #6DE895 (not legacy brown #9C4F00)
SUBJECT_COLORS (B6 · 亮色 regression) > all 4 subjects defined
